payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown glossy wooden chair with a black upholstered seat cushion and carved curved legs and back; the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and is partially occluded by a tabletop, with reflective varnished surfaces visible.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"dark glossy wooden chair edge-crop","long_description":"Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown glossy wooden chair with a black upholstered seat cushion and carved curved legs and back; the chair appears close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m) and is partially occluded by a tabletop, with reflective varnished surfaces visible.","attributes":["dark reddish-brown wood","glossy varnish / reflective finish","black upholstered seat cushion","carved curved legs","curved/ornate backrest","partial edge-crop","partially occluded by table"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
